item.title: 【Agent-of-Agents Pattern: Enhancing Software Testing】代理的代理模式：增强软件测试
item.description:
【

The Pre-Production Bottleneck

A pull request (PR) gets merged, code review is complete, unit tests are green, and the feature looks good. But then comes the familiar question: Is this actually ready for production?

Most engineering teams have a checklist: regression tests, security scans, performance validation, and integration checks. The problem is that executing all of this takes significant time. A full regression suite might take one to two hours. For a feature that touched a few files, running everything feels wasteful. But manually picking tests? That's how bugs slip into production.

】

预生产瓶颈

拉取请求 (PR) 已合并，代码审查已完成，单元测试已通过，并且该功能看起来不错。但随之而来的是一个熟悉的问题：这真的准备好投入生产了吗？

大多数工程团队都有一个清单：回归测试、安全扫描、性能验证和集成检查。问题是执行所有这些需要花费大量时间。完整的回归套件可能需要一到两个小时。对于涉及几个文件的功能，运行所有内容都感觉很浪费。但手动选择测试？这就是错误进入生产环境的方式。

item.title: 【Building Scalable Agentic Assistants: A Graph-Based Approach】构建可扩展的代理助手：基于图的方法
item.description:
【

About a year ago, we were drawn into what appeared to be a straightforward problem: building an interface assistant that could answer questions about payments, disputes, refunds, transactions, and a few other sub-domains and provide insights. The reality turned out far more complex.

Many teams already had multiple apis, data sources, internal tools, and domain experts collaborating. What we didn't have was a way to wire all this together into something that felt coherent, reliable, and scalable. Early experiments with single-agent chatbots worked for demos, but they collapsed under real organizational complexity. We needed to stop thinking in terms of agentic systems and start treating it as a coordinated system of agents, each with a narrow responsibility.

】

大约一年前，我们陷入了一个看似简单的问题：构建一个界面助手，可以回答有关付款、争议、退款、交易和其他一些子域的问题并提供见解。事实证明要复杂得多。

许多团队已经拥有多个 API、数据源、内部工具和领域专家进行协作。我们没有办法将所有这些连接在一起，形成一种连贯、可靠和可扩展的东西。早期的单代理聊天机器人实验适用于演示，但在实际的组织复杂性下它们崩溃了。我们需要停止思考代理系统，并开始将其视为一个协调的代理系统，每个代理都有一个狭窄的职责。

item.title: 【Robust Network Layer in Swift via Clean Architecture Approach】通过简洁架构方法实现 Swift 中强大的网络层
item.description:
【

Networking is the backbone of almost every modern iOS application. However, as projects grow in complexity, the network layer often becomes a “junk drawer” for URL construction, messy completion handlers, and scattered error logic. This tight coupling makes unit testing difficult and maintenance a nightmare.

In this article, we are going to build a reusable, testable, and type-safe Network Layer from scratch. By leveraging Clean Architecture principles, the power of Swift Generics, and the modern elegance of Async/Await, we will create a solution that separates concerns and scales with your app.

】

网络是几乎所有现代 iOS 应用程序的支柱。然而，随着项目变得越来越复杂，网络层常常成为 URL 构造、混乱的完成处理程序和分散的错误逻辑的“垃圾抽屉”。这种紧密的耦合使得单元测试变得困难，维护成为一场噩梦。

在本文中，我们将从头开始构建一个可重用、可测试且类型安全的网络层。通过利用清洁架构原则、Swift Generics的强大功能以及Async/Await的现代优雅，我们将创建一个解决方案，将关注点与应用程序进行扩展。

item.title: 【Data-Driven API Testing in Java With REST Assured and TestNG: Part 2】使用 REST Assured 和 TestNG 进行 Java 数据驱动 API 测试：第 2 部分
item.description:
【

In the previous article, we explored how to implement data-driven testing using Object arrays and TestNG’s @DataProvider annotation. While this approach works well for small to medium-sized datasets, it is not ideal for handling large volumes of data. To address this limitation, TestNG also supports the use of Iterators, which provide a more efficient way to manage large and dynamic datasets.

This article focuses on how to perform data-driven API automation testing using an Iterator with a DataProvider annotation of TestNG.

】

在 上一篇文章，我们探讨了如何使用Object数组和TestNG的@DataProvider注释来实现数据驱动测试。虽然这种方法适用于中小型数据集，但对于处理大量数据来说并不理想。为了解决这一限制，TestNG 还支持使用迭代器，它提供了一种更有效的方法来管理大型动态数据集。

本文重点介绍如何使用带有 TestNG 的 DataProvider 注释的 Iterator 来执行数据驱动的 API 自动化测试。

item.title: 【MariaDB Doesn't Depend on MySQL】MariaDB 不依赖于 MySQL
item.description:
【

When MariaDB was first announced in 2009 by Michael “Monty” Widenius, it was positioned as a “fork of MySQL”. I think that was a Bad Idea™. Okay, maybe it wasn’t a bad idea as such. After all, MariaDB indeed is a fork of MySQL. But what is a fork in the software sense, and how is this reflected in MariaDB? 

A fork is a software project that takes the source code of another project and continues development independently from the original. Forks often start by maintaining compatibility with their parent project, but they can evolve to become detached from their own features, architecture, bug tracker, mailing list, development philosophy, and community. This is the case of MariaDB, with the addition that it continues to be highly compatible with old MySQL versions and with its current ecosystem at large.

】

当 Michael “Monty” Widenius 于 2009 年首次宣布 MariaDB 时，它被定位为“MySQL 的分支”。我认为这是一个坏主意™。好吧，也许这并不是一个坏主意。毕竟，MariaDB 确实是 MySQL 的一个分支。但从软件意义上来说，什么是分叉？这在 MariaDB 中是如何体现的？ 

分叉是一个软件项目，它获取另一个项目的源代码并独立于原始项目继续开发。分叉通常从保持与其父项目的兼容性开始，但它们可以演变为脱离自己的功能、架构、错误跟踪器、邮件列表、开发理念和社区。 MariaDB 就是这种情况，此外它仍然与旧的 MySQL 版本及其当前的整个生态系统高度兼容。

item.title: 【The Phantom Write Problem: Why Your Idempotency Implementation Is Silently Losing Data】幻像写入问题：为什么您的幂等性实现会默默地丢失数据
item.description:
【

Idempotency implementations commonly pass unit tests yet silently corrupt data in production due to four failure modes — including failure modes that manifest as "phantom writes" — a pattern previously undocumented as a unified class of idempotency failures. This article identifies these patterns based on debugging 12 production incidents and introduces the Idempotency Barrier pattern, a unified approach combining transactional state machines, atomic claiming, and boundary-aware key propagation. After deployment across three financial platforms, the pattern eliminated 99.98% of duplicate payment incidents and reduced monthly reconciliation costs by over $220,000.

Disclosure: This research stems from debugging production incidents across multiple high-scale payment and order fulfillment platforms between 2023 and 2025. Company-specific details have been anonymized.

】

幂等性实现通常会通过单元测试，但由于四种故障模式（包括表现为“幻象写入”的故障模式）而在生产中悄悄损坏数据，这种模式以前未记录为统一的幂等性故障类别。本文基于调试 12 个生产事件来识别这些模式，并介绍幂等屏障模式，这是一种结合了事务状态机、原子声明和边界感知密钥传播的统一方法。在三个金融平台部署后，该模式消除了 99.98% 的重复支付事件，并减少了每月超过 220,000 美元的对账成本。

披露：这项研究源于调试 2023 年至 2025 年间多个大规模支付和订单履行平台上的生产事件。公司特定的详细信息已匿名。

item.title: 【Understanding SHORTUSR/USRFIELDS in AUTHINFO to Meet 12-Character Identity Limits for MQ on Windows】了解 AUTHINFO 中的 SHORTUSR/USRFIELDS 以满足 Windows 上 MQ 的 12 个字符身份限制
item.description:
【

Introduction: Modern Directories Meet Legacy Constraints

As organisations strengthen security and centralise identity management, IBM MQ administrators increasingly integrate with enterprise LDAP directories such as Microsoft Active Directory or OpenLDAP. This enables authentication using corporate credentials and authorisation through LDAP users or their group membership, instead of relying on local OS users.

However, on Windows platforms, IBM MQ still enforces a long‑standing 12‑character limit on the user ID used for authorisation. This limitation does not come from LDAP; it originates from how MQ maps authenticated identities to Windows principals for Object Authority Manager (OAM) checks. IBM MQ’s Object Authority Manager was designed to work uniformly across Windows, UNIX (AIX/Linux), and z/OS, where OS usernames traditionally max out at 12 characters. 

】

简介：现代目录满足传统约束

随着组织加强安全性并集中身份管理，IBM MQ 管理员越来越多地与企业 LDAP 目录（例如 Microsoft Active Directory 或 OpenLDAP）集成。这样可以使用公司凭据进行身份验证，并通过 LDAP 用户或其组成员身份进行授权，而不是依赖本地操作系统用户。

但是，在 Windows 平台上，IBM MQ仍然对用于授权的用户 ID 强制实施长期存在的 12 个字符限制。此限制并非来自 LDAP；而是来自 LDAP。它源自 MQ 如何将经过身份验证的身份映射到 Windows 主体以进行对象权限管理器 (OAM) 检查。 IBM MQ 的对象权限管理器旨在跨 Windows、UNIX (AIX/Linux) 和 z/OS 统一工作，其中操作系统用户名传统上最多为 12 个字符。

item.title: 【Imprisoning the Panic】囚禁恐慌
item.description:
【

This single line of code recently made a significant portion of the Internet unavailable throughout the world. 

Rust
  
let (feature_values, _) = features.append_with_names(&self.config.feature_names).unwrap();


】

这行代码最近导致全球互联网的很大一部分无法使用。 

铁锈
  
let (feature_values, _) = features.append_with_names(&self.config.feature_names).unwrap();

item.title: 【Building an Agentic AIOps Pipeline With IBM Storage Insights, n8n, and Elastic】使用 IBM Storage Insights、n8n 和 Elastic 构建代理 AIOps 管道
item.description:
【

IBM Storage Insights is a cloud-based storage monitoring and analytics platform designed to provide visibility across enterprise storage environments. It continuously collects telemetry from storage systems, analyzes capacity and performance trends, detects risks, and generates alerts when thresholds or anomalies are detected. These alerts can range from capacity and performance issues to configuration, security, and hardware health notifications.

In large environments, Storage Insights becomes a critical early-warning system — but it can also generate a high volume of alerts that require triage, investigation, and remediation. Some are critical and demand immediate attention, many are informational, and a surprising number are duplicates of issues that have already been investigated and resolved. Over time, this creates a familiar problem for operations teams: alert fatigue. Engineers spend more time triaging notifications than solving real problems, and valuable context is scattered across dashboards, chat threads, and ticketing systems.

】

IBM Storage Insights 是一个基于云的存储监控和分析平台，旨在提供跨企业存储环境的可见性。它持续从存储系统收集遥测数据，分析容量和性能趋势，检测风险，并在检测到阈值或异常时生成警报。这些警报的范围从容量和性能问题到配置、安全和硬件运行状况通知。

在大型环境中，Storage Insights 成为关键的预警系统，但它也可能生成大量需要分类、调查和修复的警报。有些是批评性的，需要立即关注，许多是信息性的，令人惊讶的是，数量与已经调查和解决的问题重复。随着时间的推移，这会给运营团队带来一个熟悉的问题：警报疲劳。工程师花在分类通知上的时间比解决实际问题要多，而且有价值的上下文分散在仪表板、聊天线程和票务系统中。

item.title: 【Beyond Reactive HPA: Designing a Predictive Autoscaler with KEDA and Time-Series Forecasting】超越反应式 HPA：使用 KEDA 和时间序列预测设计预测性自动缩放器
item.description:
【

Kubernetes scaling relies predominantly on the Horizontal Pod Autoscaler (HPA), a robust feedback loop that adjusts capacity based on observed metric saturation. While reliable for steady-state traffic, HPA is inherently reactive, it mitigates resource exhaustion only after it has begun.

For workloads with steep, predictable traffic ramps (such as morning log-in spikes or scheduled synchronization jobs), this reactive lag guarantees a period of transient performance degradation. To achieve strict Service Level Objectives (SLOs) during these ramps, infrastructure must shift from reacting to current load to anticipating future demand. This article details a feed-forward architecture using time-series forecasting (Prophet) and Kubernetes Event-Driven Autoscaling (KEDA) to provision capacity before the demand arrives.

】

Kubernetes 扩展主要依赖于 Horizo​​ntal Pod Autoscaler (HPA)，这是一个强大的反馈循环，可根据观察到的指标饱和度调整容量。虽然 HPA 对于稳态流量来说是可靠的，但它本质上是反应性的，它只有在开始后才能缓解资源耗尽。

对于具有陡峭且可预测的流量增长的工作负载（例如早上登录高峰或计划的同步作业），这种反应性滞后会导致一段时间内的短暂性能下降。为了在这些提升期间实现严格的服务级别目标 (SLO)，基础设施必须从对当前负载做出反应转向预测未来需求。本文详细介绍了一种前馈架构，该架构使用时间序列预测 (Prophet) 和 Kubernetes 事件驱动自动扩展 (KEDA) 在需求到达之前配置容量。
